how_to_apply: Visit the official CCRUM website: ccrum.res.in
Go to the “Recruitment / Job Openings” section
Register with your email ID and mobile number
Fill in the application form carefully
Upload the required documents as per post
Submit the form and keep a printout for reference

faq.question: Q1. What is CCRUM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CCRUM Recruitment 2026 is a hiring drive by the Central Council for Research in Unani Medicine for various Group A, B, and C posts, including Research Officers, Assistant Research Officers, Staff Nurse, Technical, and Administrative positions.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CCRUM 2026?
faq.answer: The total of 176 vacancies varies by post. Key roles include Research Officers, Staff Nurse, Accounts Officer, Library Assistant, Pharmacist, Clerical and Multi Tasking Staff, with detailed post-wise vacancies available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for CCRUM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Age limits are set as per CCRUM norms. Candidates should refer to the official notification for post-wise age criteria and relaxation details.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for CCRUM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online via the CCRUM website. Steps include registration with email and mobile number, filling the application form, uploading required documents, and submitting the application before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What are the important dates for CCRUM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Start Date for Apply Online: 01-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 31-07-2026
